scripts.lint: npm run -w ./api lint && npm run -w ./web lint && npm run -w ./docs lint:check
scripts.test: npm run -w ./api test:run && npm run -w ./web test:run && npm run -w ./docs test:ci && npm run -w ./workspace-server test:run
scripts.build: npm run -w ./web build && npm run -w ./docs build
scripts.format: npm run -w ./docs format && npm run -w ./workspace-server format
